---
title: "Building Sucessful Sequencing Libraries"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---
  
## Slides

```{=html}
<style>
  #myid {
    border: 10px solid rgba(20,130,130,.2);
    margin: 0;
  }
  .myclass {
    max-width: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 450px;
  }
</style>
```



![](module_1_lindsay_droit_20250224.pdf){#myid .myclass}


<a href=module_1_lindsay_droit_20250224.pdf>Download Slides</a>
